author: maxine--tui-startup-sync
content: Decision: Made 'r' a global keybinding that triggers full sync (fetch + hydrate) rather than keeping per-tab local refresh. ':r' command palette remains as local-only disk refresh. Added force_refresh() to Tab trait so sync completion can reload data for eagerly-loaded tabs (IssuesTab, KnowledgeTab). Tabs with on_enter refresh (AgentsTab, ConfigTab, MilestonesTab) use default force_refresh (on_leave + on_enter).
